'''âk-w-z''' ('''kakawaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codify|codify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codify|codify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kakawaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikawaz|thikawaz]] || [[word:jikawaz|jikawaz]] || [[word:shikawaz|shikawaz]] || [[word:kikawaz|kikawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukawaz|thuthukawaz]] || [[word:jujukawaz|jujukawaz]] || [[word:shushukawaz|shushukawaz]] || [[word:kukukawaz|kukukawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukawaz|thukawaz]] || [[word:jukawaz|jukawaz]] || [[word:shukawaz|shukawaz]] || [[word:kukawaz|kukawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukawaz|thukawaz]] || [[word:jukawaz|jukawaz]] || [[word:shukawaz|shukawaz]] || [[word:kukawaz|kukawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekawaz|thekawaz]] || [[word:jekawaz|jekawaz]] || [[word:shekawaz|shekawaz]] || [[word:kekawaz|kekawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokawaz|thothokawaz]] || [[word:jojokawaz|jojokawaz]] || [[word:shoshokawaz|shoshokawaz]] || [[word:kokokawaz|kokokawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokawaz|thokawaz]] || [[word:jokawaz|jokawaz]] || [[word:shokawaz|shokawaz]] || [[word:kokawaz|kokawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokawaz|thokawaz]] || [[word:jokawaz|jokawaz]] || [[word:shokawaz|shokawaz]] || [[word:kokawaz|kokawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkawaz|thĂŠkawaz]] || [[word:jĂŠkawaz|jĂŠkawaz]] || [[word:shĂŠkawaz|shĂŠkawaz]] || [[word:kĂŠkawaz|kĂŠkawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakawaz|thathakawaz]] || [[word:jajakawaz|jajakawaz]] || [[word:shashakawaz|shashakawaz]] || [[word:kakakawaz|kakakawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakawaz|thakawaz]] || [[word:jakawaz|jakawaz]] || [[word:shakawaz|shakawaz]] || [[word:kakawaz|kakawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakawaz|thakawaz]] || [[word:jakawaz|jakawaz]] || [[word:shakawaz|shakawaz]] || [[word:kakawaz|kakawaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakawaz|shakawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakawaz|goshakawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakawaz|gokishakawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakawaznĂŒ|shakawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakawaznknĂŒ|goshakawaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakawaznĂŒ|gokishakawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakawazshĂ«|shakawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakawaznkshĂ«|goshakawaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakawazshĂ«|gokishakawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakawazro|shakawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakawaznkro|goshakawaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakawazro|gokishakawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakawazmu|shakawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakawaznkmu|goshakawaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakawazmu|gokishakawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakawazsher|shakawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakawaznksher|goshakawaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakawazsher|gokishakawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakawazng|shakawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakawaznkng|goshakawaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakawazng|gokishakawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakawazya|shakawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakawaznkya|goshakawaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakawazya|gokishakawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakawazyam|shakawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakawaznkyam|goshakawaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakawazyam|gokishakawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakawaznĂŒshĂ«|shakawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakawaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshakawaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakawaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishakawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakawaznĂŒro|shakawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakawaznknĂŒro|goshakawaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakawaznĂŒro|gokishakawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakawaznĂŒmu|shakawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakawaznknĂŒmu|goshakawaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakawaznĂŒmu|gokishakawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakawazshĂ«nĂŒ|shakawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakawazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakawazshĂ«ro|shakawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakawaznkshĂ«ro|goshakawaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakawazshĂ«ro|gokishakawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakawazshĂ«mu|shakawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakawaznkshĂ«mu|goshakawaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakawazshĂ«mu|gokishakawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakawazronĂŒ|shakawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakawaznkronĂŒ|goshakawaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakawazronĂŒ|gokishakawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakawazroshĂ«|shakawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakawaznkroshĂ«|goshakawaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakawazroshĂ«|gokishakawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakawazromu|shakawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakawaznkromu|goshakawaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakawazromu|gokishakawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakawazmunĂŒ|shakawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakawaznkmunĂŒ|goshakawaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakawazmunĂŒ|gokishakawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakawazmushĂ«|shakawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakawaznkmushĂ«|goshakawaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakawazmushĂ«|gokishakawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakawazmuro|shakawazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakawaznkmuro|goshakawaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakawazmuro|gokishakawazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
